allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "C:/msys64/mingw64/bin/gdb.exe"\) { "msys64 gdb: EXISTS" } else { "msys64 gdb: MISSING" }; $g = Get-Command gdb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "gdb on PATH: $\($g.Source\)" } else { "gdb on PATH: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($exe = 'c:\\Users\\clare\\Documents\\GitHub\\CSOPESY\\output\\main.exe'; if \(Test-Path $exe\) { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($exe\); $peOffset = [BitConverter]::ToInt32\($bytes, 0x3C\); $machine = [BitConverter]::ToUInt16\($bytes, $peOffset + 4\); switch \($machine\) { 0x8664 { "main.exe: x64 \(AMD64\)" }; 0x14c  { "main.exe: x86 \(i386\)" }; default { "main.exe: machine=0x{0:X}" -f $machine } } } else { "main.exe: not built yet" }; $g64 = 'C:\\msys64\\mingw64\\bin\\gdb.exe'; $g32 = 'C:\\msys64\\mingw32\\bin\\gdb.exe'; "mingw64 gdb present: $\(Test-Path $g64\)"; "mingw32 gdb present: $\(Test-Path $g32\)"; $gpp = Get-Command g++ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gpp\) { "g++ on PATH: $\($gpp.Source\)" } else { "g++ on PATH: NOT FOUND" }; if \(Test-Path 'c:\\Users\\clare\\Documents\\GitHub\\CSOPESY\\.vscode\\tasks.json'\) { "tasks.json: present" } else { "tasks.json: missing \(preLaunchTask 'build' will fail\)" })
